heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds and wildfire smoke. Slight chance of a shower north, mainly near the Québec border. Highs from the upper 70s to mid 80s. West to northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Variable clouds with patches of wildfire smoke. Chance of an evening shower, mainly north. Lows from the upper 50s to mid 60s, with some mid 50s northeast and in the Adirondacks. West to northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then becoming west and decreasing to 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Patches of wildfire smoke. Otherwise mostly sunny south. Increasing clouds north, with the chance of afternoon showers and thunderstorms, mainly late. Highs the mid to upper 80s south, and upper 70s to mid 80s north, with some mid 70s northeast. West to northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph.
